more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Prepaid Electricity Tokens Now Available Online As ZESA Restores Most Platforms After Nationwide System Failure
more.description: ZESA Restores Prepaid Electricity Tokens Online After Nationwide System Failure Prepaid electricity tokens are now available online again after Zimbabwe Electricity Supply Authority (ZESA) confirmed that most third-party vending platforms have been restored following a nationwide system malfunction that began on Sunday, 22 March 2026. more.title: ZIMSEC Exam Cheats Face Up to 5 Years in Jail Under New Law
more.description: Zimbabwe Tightens ZIMSEC Exam Cheating Laws, Raises Jail Term to Five Years Zimbabwe’s National Assembly has approved stricter penalties for examination-related offences, significantly increasing the consequences for those found guilty of cheating or leaking exam materials. more.title: Small Scale gold miners output hits 2,525kg
more.description: GOLD output from the Artisanal Small Scale Miners surged to 2,525.6 kg in February complementing the total 31,5% overall increase recorded during the period, Fidelity Gold Refineries (FGR) said in the latest update.
